title: Linux SUID and Capability Audit
description: This runbook operationalizes Linux SUID and Capability Audit using #find , #getcap . It is designed for repeatable, high-signal execution in authorized OSCP/CPTS-style assessments. Finds privileged binaries and file capabilities suitable for GTFOBins-style escalation.

metadata.descriptionHtml:
This runbook operationalizes Linux SUID and Capability Audit using #find , #getcap. It is designed for repeatable, high-signal execution in authorized OSCP/CPTS-style assessments.

Finds privileged binaries and file capabilities suitable for GTFOBins-style escalation.

  1. Prepare scope and access: validate target reachability and select low-noise execution order.
  2. Execute core workflow: run the command chain to produce actionable security outcomes.
  3. Validate and operationalize output: confirm results, capture artifacts, and prepare follow-on actions.
  • Tool Location/Source: primary references are in local source corpus entries linked from runbook-list.md; e.g., docs/sources-runbooks/oscp-cpts/p0/lagarian-smith-oscp-cheat-sheet/OSCP_Notes.md:1722; docs/sources-runbooks/oscp-cpts/p0/0xsyr0-OSCP/README.md:6150.
  • Attack pre-requisite: authorized scope, operator shell access, and protocol reachability on TCP 80, TCP 443.
  • What attacker gain: validated findings (access paths, credentials, execution context, or exposure evidence) enabling faster compromise progression.
  • Detection/Defense opsec: monitor abnormal auth/enumeration bursts, enforce least privilege and hardening baselines, and alert on repeated tool-pattern telemetry.

Core Commands:

find / -perm -4000 -type f 2>/dev/null
/usr/sbin/getcap -r / 2>/dev/null
extraInfo: primary references are in local source corpus entries linked from runbook-list.md ; e.g., docs/sources-runbooks/oscp-cpts/p0/lagarian-smith-oscp-cheat-sheet/OSCP_Notes.md:1722; docs/sources-runbooks/oscp-cpts/p0/0xsyr0-OSCP/README.md:6150 .
prerequisites: authorized scope, operator shell access, and protocol reachability on TCP 80 , TCP 443 .
attackerGains: validated findings (access paths, credentials, execution context, or exposure evidence) enabling faster compromise progression.
detectionNotes: monitor abnormal auth/enumeration bursts, enforce least privilege and hardening baselines, and alert on repeated tool-pattern telemetry.
